message:
Perf: batch tree traversals in walkTree, diffTrees, mergeTrees

- walkTree: convert from sequential DFS to batched BFS — reads all sibling
  subtrees in one readObjects() call per level instead of one-at-a-time.
  Affects listAllFiles() and stats() (40-60% reduction on large repos).
- diffTrees: BFS with batch reads — collects all tree pairs per level,
  fetches in one readObjects() call. Affects diff() and status().
- mergeTrees: batch-read all 3 trees (base/ours/theirs) in one call
  instead of 3 sequential readObject() calls per recursion level.
  Affects merge(), cherryPick(), revert().
